title: Acme Corp — engagement scoping
transcript: Reema (Acme Corp, COO): Thanks for joining. We want a carbon baseline we can stand behind at the June board meeting. Victor (Acme Corp, CFO): I'll be honest — I'm not convinced we need a fully independent baseline. Can't we just estimate it internally and save the spend? Consultant: We can, but an internal estimate won't survive auditor or lender scrutiny, and you'll end up paying twice when you have to redo it. Victor: I hear you, but I'm not sold yet. Jane (Acme Corp, Head of Sustainability): Victor, a credible number is exactly what protects us if anyone challenges the disclosure. Consultant: For scope, we decided to cover Scope 1 and Scope 2 now, and limit Scope 3 to Category 1 — purchased goods and services — for this phase. Reema: Agreed, keep it contained. Consultant: I'll deliver a detailed project plan and data request list by April 23. Reema: Good. Let's keep this on the board timeline.
